items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to session token binding to device/IP. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API interactions or results that demonstrate the expected behavior or failure report for this scenario. As such, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
